steps.title: Check the stated inequality
steps.content:
The bundled stem states
$$
x-9y>12
$$
Dividing by $3$ would not preserve equivalence because only the last two terms are divisible by $3$ in the stated inequality.

steps.title: Relate the keyed choice
steps.content: Choice B, $x-3y>4$, would follow from dividing $$ 3x-9y>12 $$ by $3$. With the bundled stem as written, this is a source inconsistency rather than an algebra step from the stated inequality. The answer is B.
